inputs.name: allowFileDeletion
inputs.description: Whether or not to show the delete button. Default is true.

inputs.name: allowFileNameEdit
inputs.description: Whether or not to allow file name editing. Default is true.

inputs.name: disableFileDeletion
inputs.description: Whether or not to disable the delete button. Default is false.

inputs.name: disableFileNameEdit
inputs.description: Whether or not to disable the file name edit button. Default is false.

outputs.name: deleteClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when the user clicks the delete button.

outputs.name: editClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when the user clicks the edit button.

outputs.name: okClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when the user clicks the OK button to conform a file name change.
